title: Hierarchy of Proximity Measures
description: A visual breakdown of common proximity measures used in machine learning, categorized by data type and purpose.
elements: Non-Metric Similarities (e.g., Cosine Similarity, Jaccard Index)
relationships: Proximity Measures is a parent category
Similarity Measures and Dissimilarity Measures are child categories of Proximity Measures
Distance Metrics and Non-Metric Similarities are types of Similarity Measures
Correlation Coefficients are a specialized form of Similarity Measure
